title: Bouldering Zombies
description: Adds the Bouldering Zombie from Minecraft Earth.
body: Adds the Bouldering Zombie mob from Minecraft Earth. These zombies spawn in biomes defined by the `#wich:spawns_bouldering_zombies` tag [default `minecraft:plains` and `minecraft:sunflower_plains`]. Bouldering Zombies can climb like spiders.
